candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: The pedigree in the figure shows the mode of inheritance of a human disease that is associated with mutations in Gene A. Note: Individuals marrying into this family DO NOT have the disease-associated allele unless shaded and the pedigree is completely penetrant. What is the genotype(s) of Individual 9?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 图$<image 1>$中的谱系图显示了与基因A中的突变相关的人类疾病的遗传方式。注意:只有携带该疾病相关等位基因的个体才会表现出该疾病的症状,且该疾病的遗传方式为完全遗传。请问个体9的基因型是什么?
